title: A Tren de Aragua Leader Is Killed in a Joint Strike, U.S. and Venezuela Say
summary_full: A strike this week in Venezuela killed a gang leader known as Niño Guerrero who was wanted in the United States, officials in both countries said.
summary_public: A strike this week in Venezuela killed a gang leader known as Niño Guerrero who was wanted in the United States, officials in both countries said.
